nodes.name: Diglossa
nodes.summary: Diglossa（Diglossa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Chestnut-bellied flowerpiercer、Glossy flowerpiercer、Moustached flowerpiercer等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cinnamon-bellied flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: The cinnamon-bellied flowerpiercer (Diglossa baritula) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Mexico. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. It is a species known to be a nectar robber, apparently taking nectar while not pollinating the plant. References
